summary: Iteration 7 verification of EAS Android APK build fixes (expo-doctor failures). All checks pass: expo-doctor reports 18/18 with exit code 0; app.json android section no longer contains 'navigationBar'; icon.png, adaptive-icon.png, favicon.png are all 512x512; splash-icon.png exists (336x729, accepted by expo-doctor); package.json has expo@~54.0.35, expo-font@~14.0.12, expo-router@~6.0.24, @expo/vector-icons@15.1.1, and resolutions for @expo/vector-icons (15.1.1) and @react-navigation/native (7.1.8). Backend regression: GET /api/ returns 200 with version 1.0.0; POST /api/calc/cytology with Estrus payload returns stage=Estrus correctly. Frontend smoke: splash screen at https://canine-cycle.preview.emergentagent.com loads with TANUVAS seal, doggy logo image, GUIDED BY section, ANIMitra Software credit, Version 1.0.0, and loading bar all visible.

image_dimensions.splash-icon.png: 336x729 (exists; not required to be square per expo-doctor)

verification_results.backend_api_root: HTTP 200 — {message: Doggy Breeding App API, version: 1.0.0}

context_for_next_testing_agent: EAS build blocker (expo-doctor exit code 1) is resolved. expo-doctor now reports 18/18 passed. All assets and package.json deduplication confirmed. Backend and frontend splash screen remain functional with no regressions. Note: a console warning 'Animated: useNativeDriver is not supported' appears on the web preview — this is expected on web (RCTAnimation is native-only) and does not affect Android/iOS builds. No action needed.
rca_of_issue: Original EAS prebuild failure was caused by expo-doctor finding 3 issues: (1) invalid 'android.navigationBar' field in app.json schema, (2) non-square icons (512x513), and (3) duplicate native module dependency trees. All three root causes have been mitigated and verified — expo-doctor exits 0 and EAS Android APK builds should no longer be blocked by the doctor check.
